headline: ₹500-2,000 Cr at risk over medium term if transition accelerates. — Adani Power's major coal investments risk stranded asset exposure amid accelerating energy transition.
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, CDP, GRI triggered; non-disclosure or poor scores may attract SEBI scrutiny and penalties.
P/E compression risk (5-10%) as FII and ESG funds reduce exposure; margin erosion likely if carbon costs rise.
Potential cost of capital increase (20-40bps) due to negative ESG screening and BRSR scrutiny.
